Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Mosaic Robotics" or "Tamara Byrd" or "prototype damage" or "ExpenseBot" or "vendor rate" (or similar) using search_emails to find the prototype damage claim correspondence, receipt verification request to Tamara, expense auto-categorizer false approval reports, vendor rate increase notifications from Swift and Heartland, invoice INV-2026-0411 details, and Elena's directive on honoring approvals.
OE 2: Search Slack with a query related to "Mosaic Robotics" or "vendor rate" or "DOT compliance" or "expense categorizer" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to find Emeka's April 15 flag that Mosaic is exposed to vendor rate increases, DOT compliance discussions for Keiko Tanaka's laser cutter shipment, expense categorizer issues, and Emeka's capacity overload flag in #operations.
OE 3: Look up the Mosaic Robotics company record with a query related to "Mosaic Robotics" or "company_mosaic" (or similar) using crm_search_companies or crm_get_company to find the company record (company_mosaic) and related deals including deal stages (deal_mosaic_q2 closedwon, deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026/deal_mosaic_hartley_apr2026/deal_mosaic_tanaka_apr2026 all at in progress, deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026_risk in progress), and the damage incident engagement log (engagement_mosaic_damage_incident_041526) with root cause details on Blessing Okafor's remote sign-off and Heartland's unscheduled Macon stop.
OE 4: Look up Tamara Byrd's contact information with a query related to "Tamara Byrd" or "Mosaic" (or similar) using crm_search_contacts or crm_get_contact to find her email address (tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com) for sending the pre-call summary.
OE 5: Search Airtable Relocations table (tblRelocations01) with a query related to "Mosaic Robotics" (or similar) using airtable_search_records to find statuses for Zara Okoye (Savannah -> Atlanta, Completed), Deshawn Hartley (Tampa -> Denver, In Progress - stale, move window ended April 19), Keiko Tanaka (Columbus -> Seattle, In Progress - stale, move window ended April 23), Andre Washington (Detroit -> Atlanta, Completed), Tanya Reeves (San Diego -> Seattle, Completed), Lena Kowalski (Detroit -> Salt Lake City, In Progress), and Andre Mitchell (Columbus -> Boise, In Progress).
OE 6: Search Airtable Stipend Transactions table (tblStipends00001) with a query related to "Mosaic Robotics" or "ExpenseBot" (or similar) using airtable_search_records to find the ExpenseBot false approvals (Andre Washington's $1,200 standing desk over the $800 limit, Andre Washington's $350 coworking membership in an excluded category, Kenji Nakamura's $135 coworking day passes in an excluded category - $885 total exposure) and the $89 ergonomic keyboard (rec_stipend_andre_keyboard) flagged with a duplicate receipt hash matching Kevin Tran at Vectral Systems, currently on administrative hold.
OE 7: Search Linear with a query related to "Mosaic" or "ENG-215" or "DOT compliance" (or similar) using linear_search_issues to find ENG-215 (Mosaic policy config fix), ENG-216 (full audit of 47 expenses), ENG-220 (stipend duplicate detection - receipt hash fingerprinting), and DOT compliance tickets for Keiko Tanaka (issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic in progress, issue_dot_tanaka_subtask_swift_cert todo/urgent).
OE 8: Search QuickBooks with a query related to "Mosaic" or "INV-2026-0411" or "damage accrual" (or similar) using quickbooks_search_invoices or quickbooks_search_bills to find INV-2026-0411 ($9,010, due May 2, with $1,200 crating surcharge on billing hold), credit memo CM-2026-0415 (-$90,000 prototype damage placeholder), the $90,000 contingent liability accrual (bill_mosaic_damage_accrual_001), and the $50,000 DOT/PHMSA penalty accrual (bill_dot_penalty_accrual_q2) for Keiko Tanaka's laser shipment.
OE 9: Look up Tamara Byrd's contact information with a query related to "Tamara Byrd" (or similar) using crm_search_contacts or crm_get_contact to confirm her email address (tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com) for the pre-call summary email.
OE 10: Update Airtable relocation records for Deshawn Hartley (recDeshawnHartleyTampaDenver) and Keiko Tanaka (recKeikoTanakaColumbusSeattle) from "In Progress" to "Completed" using airtable_update_records - both move windows have ended, and the current date is April 26.
OE 11: Update CRM deal stages for completed Mosaic relocations (deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026, deal_mosaic_hartley_apr2026, deal_mosaic_tanaka_apr2026) from "in progress" to "closedwon" using crm_update_deal_stage to keep tracking current.
OE 12: Follow up on the Andre Washington receipt verification with Tamara Byrd - either by sending a dedicated follow-up email using send_email or Slack message using conversations_add_message, or by including it as an explicit outstanding action item in the pre-call summary email. The $89 keyboard receipt verification request sent ~6 weeks ago has gone unanswered.
OE 13: Send a pre-call summary email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com using send_email covering: the prototype damage claim status ($90K value, $40K insurance gap, pending adjudication), April relocations status by employee, expense auto-categorizer false approvals ($885 total, MoveOps absorbing), Andre Washington duplicate receipt ($89 keyboard, verification needed), DOT compliance for Keiko Tanaka's laser cutter, invoice INV-2026-0411 ($9,010, crating surcharge on hold), and open items requiring Tamara's input.
OE 14: Report a comprehensive status summary to the user (Emeka) covering all Mosaic Robotics open items, including the damage claim, all 7 relocations, expense issues, vendor rate increases impacting Mosaic, DOT compliance gaps, and financial discrepancies.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The send_email content explicitly mentions 'Prototype Unit #1 ($90K)', the '$40K gap' (as 'MoveOps' direct financial exposure if Heartland Movers does not accept liability'), and states 'Our insurance claim has been filed... insurance pending adjudication.' All three key facts are present.
✓Run #2The email body explicitly mentions the prototype damage claim: 'Prototype Unit #1 is valued at $90,000. Our vendor liability cap is $50,000, leaving a $40,000 gap.' It also states insurance adjudication is pending and Heartland Movers' liability is being pursued.
✓Run #3The email body mentions 'Prototype Unit #1 ($90,000 value)', '$50,000 per item has been applied... working with Heartland Movers on their acceptance of liability for the remaining $40,000 gap', and 'insurance adjudication in progress'. All three key facts are present.
✓Run #4The email body explicitly mentions the prototype damage: 'Credit memo CM-2026-0415 has been applied'; 'prototype is valued at $90,000' (Zara Okoye's relocation listed as completed with damage); 'the remaining $40,000 gap'; and 'Insurance claim is PENDING adjudication.' All key criteria are met.
